issues.sample: TWO WEEKS AFTER PURCHASING MY CAR I ATTEMPTED TO START IT ONE MORNING. I GOT IN THE CAR AND PROCEEDED TO PUT MY FOOT ON THE BREAK PEDAL AND PUSH TO START. WHEN DOING THAT THE ENGINE DID NOT START AND THE LIGHTS WERE FLICKERING. I GOT OUT OF THE CAR TOOK THE KEY WITH ME AND THE LI

AFTER DRIVING IN MODERATE RAIN FOR 15 MILES AND THEN BRAKING IN MODERATE RAIN, A LOUD GRINDING NOISE WAS HEARD, BRAKE PEDAL BECAME HARD AND NO BRAKING ACTION WAS AVAILABLE.  I WAS ABLE TO SAFELY GET THE VEHICLE TO THE SHOULDER AND COME TO A TOP USING  UPHILL GRADE OF THE ROAD WAY

VEHICLE WAS PULLED 3/4 INTO THE GARAGE WITH THE BACK WHEELS ON THE APPROACH OF THE DRIVEWAY.  VEHICLE WAS PUT INTO PARK AND SHUT OFF.  I RETURNED TO THE GARAGE 10 MINUTES LATER TO FIND THE VEHICLE HAD ROLLED DOWN THE DRIVEWAY, STRIKING A TREE CAUSING SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE.  VEHICLE

2017 FORD EXPEDITION.  CAR WAS RUNNING NORMAL, CRUISING AT 45MPH ON CITY STREET, THEN UNEXPECTED LOSS OF THROTTLE, CAUSING IMMEDIATE DECELERATION.  ACCELERATOR NO LONGER RESPONDING TO INPUT. WRENCH LIGHT CAME ON; HAD TO COAST TO A STOP WITH TRAFFIC COMING FAST BEHIND ME.  SHUT OF

TOTAL BRAKE FAILURE WHILE BACKING UP , ALMOST HIT ANOTHER VEHICLE, SHIFTED TO FORWARD TO AVOID ACCIDENT  , LOSS OF BRAKE FLUID IN MASTER CYLINDER TO BRAKE BOOSTER. EXACT SYMPTOMS AS RECALL 20S31 WITH 2014 TO 2017 F150. THE EXPEDITION IS ON AF150 CHASSIS . ACCORDING TO DEALER NOT

narrative.headline: What 2017 Ford Expedition owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 351 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
